contentBlocks.text: Personal Training at The Vault Gym
Train Smarter. Train Harder. Train Private.
If you’re done with crowded gyms, generic workouts and frustrating lack of results, the Vault Gym offers a different way to train.
We’re a private, PT-only gym in Shoreditch, built for people who want real results through 1:1 personal training - no memberships, no chaos, no distractions.
This Isn’t a Commercial Gym
Every session at The Vault is for personal training only. That means:

contentBlocks.listText:
No overcrowding
No waiting for equipment
No people filming, flexing, or wandering around

contentBlocks.text: Just you, your coach, and the space to train properly.
Whether your goal is fat loss, strength, performance, rehab, or confidence — this is an environment designed for focus and progress.
Work With the Right Personal Trainer for You
At The Vault, you choose the personal trainer that fits your goals, personality, and training style.
Our PTs are experienced professionals who run their own businesses here - which means they care deeply about results, reputation, and long-term client success.

From strength and conditioning to calisthenics, to triathlete training and CrossFit, or for someone just starting out on their fitness journey, we’ll find a coach who takes you and your training seriously.
A Private, Premium Training Environment
At The Vault, you’ll never have to rush, wait, or compromise your session, and our trainers will work closely with you to understand your mindset, lifestyle and fitness goals.
You’ll train in:

contentBlocks.listText:
A calm, private gym atmosphere
Fully equipped free weights and machines
Functional training zones
A dedicated heavy lifting room
A private yoga & movement studio

contentBlocks.text: Serious Equipment. Serious Results.
We’re equipped to support every training style, including:

contentBlocks.listText:
Plate-loaded machines
Olympic lifting platform
CrossFit rig
Cable and cardio machines
Functional and mobility equipment

contentBlocks.text: Whether you’re lifting heavy, learning the basics, or rebuilding strength - your training is never limited by the space.
Personal Training Without the Gym Nonsense
You won’t find:

contentBlocks.listText:
Long-term gym contracts
Crowded peak hours
Sales pressure or hidden fees

contentBlocks.text: Instead, you’ll get:

contentBlocks.listText:
1:1 coaching
Structured, progressive training
A private, professional environment
A gym that respects your time

contentBlocks.html: If you’re serious about your health, strength, and performance, The Vault Gym is where you train. Just fill in the form and we’ll get in touch to introduce you to a personal trainer who will get you.

seo.title: Train With A Pro | The Vault Gym London
seo.description: Private 1:1 personal training in Shoreditch: no crowded gyms, no memberships — calm atmosphere, expert PTs, and serious equipment at The Vault Gym.
